reviews.name: Mary Vicidomina
reviews.text: Bratton Physical Therapy took care of me 7 years ago when I had a total knee replacement. They gave me excellent care! Jena is not only an expert in her field, she is also caring. She listened to me and understood my condition. So when I broke my arm in October, I knew I'd return to Bratton Physical Therapy. After my 1st visit for PT this week, I knew I made the right decision to go back for expert care. I was in pain, and since I'm right handed my life pretty much stopped. I came to Bratton Physical Therapy and immediately started feeling better. The staff is very kind. They listened to me and worked with me so I could recover. Now, I have no pain and I'm back to all my activities. I highly recommend Bratton Physical Therapy. You won't be disappointed!I am back at Bratton Physical Therapy recovering from a very big back surgery. When I first came 2 weeks ago, I could hardly move. Now I'm doing some of the things I love and I'm improving more at each visit! I highly recommend them to everyone!I recently finished physical therapy after back surgery. I'm feeling good and I am so grateful for the care I received at Bratton Physical Therapy.UPDATE: On January 7, 2026 i had a very big back surgery. I had 22 staples in my back and I was in a lot of pain. My activities were extremely limited. When my staples were removed, I went back to Bratton Physical Therapy to begin my recovery. It was a slow recovery because my surgery was so intense. Jena and staff customized my recovery plan and I began to improve. I asked for more therapy so I was signed up for 6 more weeks, which just ended. I wanted to work on my balance. Before my last session, both Jena and Madyson videotaped and explained the exercises for me to do at home. They are caring, compassionate and want the best for each patient! I highly recommend Bratton Physical Therapy!

reviews.name: Denice Foll
reviews.text: Such caring and so thoughtful staff.

reviews.name: Alfred Johnson
reviews.text: The staff is very professional. All guide your routine with caution and care.. I began recovery after my first visit. I know my recovery is in good hands. All are kind, caring, and efficient. Give them a call and visit. You will NOT be disappointed. It is a great place!!

reviews.name: Susan Behrens
reviews.text: I had trouble with my right knee. It felt stiff, sore and achy. My brother supposed trying Bratton Therapy Centre. So I did and it was the best decision ever.They came up with a special exercise program, just for me which would strengthen knee. It worked and my knee feels so much better.The staff are kind and can’t do enough for you. I totally recommend them to anyone who has a physical problem.

reviews.name: Julissa Robinson
reviews.text: I came in here after knee surgery. This is the best physical therapy clinic in Slidell! I could barely walk with a walker at the beginning. I am walking unassisted and with a cane for longer distances within 3 weeks!

reviews.name: H. "Chip" Brockhaus
reviews.text: Very knowledgeable owner and staff. Jena correctly determined the issue with my shoulder and prepared a treatment plan. Pain is now nearly 0 and my range of motion has improved significantly. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Lori Milford
reviews.text: Bratton Physical Therapy has helped me so much. I was in so much pain in my back and my hip that I could not function in my daily home and work life. Jena was able to pinpoint the root causes of my pain and develop a care plan to improve my condition. I cannot believe how much better I feel. After a few sessions, I am able to return to work and participate more fully in my social and daily life. I am certain I will continue to improve and look forward to being mostly pain-free. If you need help, don’t hesitate, go to Bratton Physical Therapy for a professional, life-changing experience.

reviews.name: Janet Imbraguglio
reviews.text: I am presently getting therapy for a rotator cuff surgery at Bratton physical therapy. It was highly recommended to me and I understand why. Having gone through Ochsner therapy for my previous shoulder, I can truly say there is no comparison. Bratton feels almost like family. I love the 15 minute heat treatment at the end of each visit.

reviews.name: Gary L.
reviews.text: Just want to thank Jena and staff for a great job in rehabbing my right rotator cuff. I had two complete tears out of the four muscles of the cuff. Jena and staff rehabbed my shoulder without a need for surgery...

reviews.name: John C.
reviews.text: The experience has been outstanding! When I first came to Bratton Physical Therapy I had sore ankles, couldn't walk more than 50 feet, getting up from sitting was painful. Now I can easily walk 100's of yards (likely more), I have no pain...

reviews.name: Barbara K.
reviews.text: My journey at Bratton PT began after I spent 3 days, about 6 hours a day working on a ladder moving shelving over my head remodeling my master closet. I developed pain in my neck and upper back. I chose Bratton PT because I used them in the past...

reviews.name: Nina S.
reviews.text: Before coming I struggled picking up my son, sitting comfortably, and sleeping due to severe shoulder pain and limited neck mobility. Jena knew what the issue was immediately. She created a plan that quickly diminished my pain...

reviews.name: Stephen D.
reviews.text: After major rotator cuff surgery, I was unable to move my arm away from my side. I was also experiencing considerable pain related to the surgery. For my physical therapy treatment, my Surgeon recommended Jena Bratton, PT...

reviews.name: James S.
reviews.text: My journey has been one of great pain and great rewards. Many years ago my knees began failing and I was not successful with gym workouts helping the problem. It took quite a while in obtaining surgical approval to have my knees replaced...

reviews.name: Paul R.
reviews.text: Undergoing PT for total hip replacement. The treatment is awesome. I get a custom PT plan focused on my needs and progress. I am so happy I came to Bratton.

reviews.name: Jeannie R.
reviews.text: You cannot go wrong having your pains disappear at Bratton PT! Individual attention, explanation of each procedure before it is executed! They make it fun!

reviews.name: Nathan W.
reviews.text: I came to seek relief from my Achilles tendon pain and very quickly they worked with me to make a targeted plan to reduce pain long term. Excellent experience.

reviews.name: Don N.
reviews.text: When I came to Bratton for a very weak right shoulder, I was becoming one arm person. After 6 weeks of physical therapy I now have full extension and much less pain. My sleep at night has improved as well.

reviews.name: Duran H.
reviews.text: Extremely friendly staff. They know what they are doing here. I would recommend this place to anyone. Already feeling results after a couple of weeks.

reviews.name: Nicholas B.
reviews.text: My back pain was making day-to-day life absolutely miserable, but coming to see Ms. Jena and her amazing staff has been a total game-changer. I have significantly less pain and more flexibility.
